scripts.build: bun run --cwd backend build && bun run --cwd web build
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "bun run dev" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.test: bun run --cwd backend build && bun test _test_/*.test.mjs && bun run --cwd backend test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd backend lint && bun run --cwd web lint
